response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and experience with diverse technologies, including distributed systems and cloud infrastructure. However, his background lacks explicit focus on C++ (a core requirement) and direct technical leadership in cloud compute platforms, though his mentorship and open-source contributions show leadership potential.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and large-scale infrastructure (e.g., Dunnhumby media, GISCollective).
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, talks, and open-source projects (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial).
Diverse technical background with exposure to cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and DevOps practices.
concerns: Limited documented experience with C++ (core requirement), with most work in TypeScript, Node.js, or Dlang.
No explicit technical leadership role in cloud compute platforms; leadership experience is more informal (e.g., mentorship, workshops).
Lack of production-level cloud architecture experience balancing short- and long-term needs (preferred qualification).
